nasb.text: Asa was the father of Jehoshaphat, Jehoshaphat the father of Joram, and Joram the father of Uzziah.

esv.text: and Asaph the father of Jehoshaphat, and Jehoshaphat the father of Joram, and Joram the father of Uzziah,

cnv.text: 亞撒生約沙法，約沙法生約蘭，約蘭生烏西雅，

ccb.text: 亚撒生约沙法， 约沙法生约兰， 约兰生乌西雅，

csbs.text: 亚撒生约沙法， 约沙法生约兰， 约兰生乌西亚，
